message:
Command `
# The pipe: OpenROAD fd[1,2] -> pipe:3207830 -> LibreLane fd[11]
# LibreLane reads from the pipe and processes output. The tee was in the outer shell.
# Check what's in the tee log
wc -l /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
tail -5 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log

echo ""
# LibreLane process state
LIBREPID=956480
cat /proc/$LIBREPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|VmRSS|Threads)"

# Check if pipe has data buffered
# /proc/$LIBREPID/fdinfo/11 should show how much is in the pipe read buffer
cat /proc/$LIBREPID/fdinfo/11 2>/dev/null
` executed with exit code 0.
